0x00452680.name: FUN_00403510
0x00452680.summary: Procedural animation generator creating sinusoidal motion for swimming or breathing effects. Returns zero when animation disabled (param_1+0x344==1). Every 60 frames (param_2%0x3c==0), randomizes amplitude to 1-5 and stores at param_1+0xa18. Continuously accumulates phase angle at param_1+0xa14 by constant DAT_00452680, wrapping at DAT_00452678 (likely 2π). Computes sine of scaled phase (DAT_004525a0 * angle * DAT_00452670) and multiplies by amplitude to produce oscillating output. Creates varied, natural-looking breathing/swimming motion with randomized intensity.

0x00452678.name: FUN_0041fd10
0x00452678.summary: Oscillating motion generator that creates wave-like vertical movement using dual sine waves. Unless paused (this+0x4c8==1), increments phase accumulator at +0x4b8 by _DAT_00452b10 speed constant, wraps at 360 degrees (_DAT_00452678), calculates sine of phase times conversion factors (_DAT_00452a58 and _DAT_00452670 likely PI/180 and scale), converts to integer via __ftol, stores at +0x4ac. Repeats with second phase at +0x4b4 storing result at +0x4b0. Conditionally modifies output Y coordinate param_1[1] based on param_2+0x110 range check (decrements by 2 if outside 0-1 range) or bit test of this+0x4bc against 0x80000001 (decrements by 1 if bit clear).

0x00452664.name: FUN_00403620
0x00452664.summary: Complete creature frame processing function executing AI dispatch (with delta time conversion param_2 * DAT_00452664), handling state return codes (2=breeding flag, 5=special event), normalizing direction vector at this+0x370-0x378 via SQRT magnitude calculation, setting camera view transform with negated direction, applying growth-stage-dependent material colors from DAT_00458200 lookup table, conditionally scaling material properties when this+0x3b0 flag active, updating position transform, and copying state flags this+0x348/34c to output buffer puVar6. Includes one-time scene object initialization via FUN_00439e40 when this+0x8f8 is zero.

0x00452668.name: FUN_004031f0
0x00452668.summary: Complete creature update pipeline executing every frame (30-60Hz) that orchestrates animation, AI, and rendering. First applies skeletal skinning transformations to mesh vertices via dual-pass FUN_0041bc60 (bone 0) and single-pass FUN_0041be40 (bone 6). Dispatches CHigyoBrain AI via FUN_00405610 with 12 parameters including delta time, objects, and position data, handling return codes: 2=breeding trigger (sets this+0x34c=1, zeros mate reference at this+0x5a4+0x350), 3=special event (zeros this+0xa10). Generates procedural swimming motion via FUN_00403510 when not paused (this+0x39c==0). Updates camera transforms via multiple vtable calls (+0x10, +0xec, +0xf0, +0x90) positioning creature with swimming offset. Checks breeding eligibility via FUN_00403440 when timer this+0xa0c exceeds threshold _DAT_00452668, setting breeding flag this+0xa10 on success. Accumulates frame time into breeding timer (line 317). Writes final breeding/mate status to output structure via puVar4 (lines 318-319).

0x004526ac.name: FUN_00405870
0x004526ac.summary: Time-based hunger progression implementing threshold trigger mechanism. Reads hunger level from 'SeamanPC\Bio\Hunger' variable via get_variable_index_wrapper (line 2268). Branches on hunger level: Level 1 (lines 2269-2274): multiplies param_1 (delta time) by global _DAT_004526ac rate, adds to this+500 accumulator (offset 500 = 0x1f4), checks if accumulator >= threshold _DAT_004526b0, returns early if below threshold. Levels 2-3 (lines 2276-2287): validates range 2 <= level <= 3 (returns if outside), multiplies param_1 by different rate _DAT_004526b4, accumulates to this+500, checks same threshold _DAT_004526b0. On threshold exceeded (both paths converge at line 2289): calls list_move_node_to_front(this, 0x20) to trigger event (line 2289), resets this+500 to zero (line 2290). Other hunger levels (<1 or >3) are no-ops (lines 2277-2281).

0x00468b90.name: FUN_00433d10
0x00468b90.summary: Loads position coordinates from global arrays based on identity parameter (0→DAT_00468b90-b9c, 1→DAT_00468ba0-bac), calculates screen-relative positioning with bounds checking using GetSystemMetrics, formats debug string 'UsedIdentity %d' if DAT_004602e4 is valid, then calls TalkAway_SoundPlay with calculated center coordinates. Returns 1 on success, 0 on failure.

0x00468bbc.name: FUN_00436ba0
0x00468bbc.summary: Core frame update function orchestrating all game systems in sequence. Begins with date check triggering daily weather refresh, then processes mouse input via handle_mouse_event. Handles BIO event counters (increment/decrement) and mail delivery system: consumes pending mail buffer via check_and_clear_counter, spawns mail entities (up to 5) while categorizing as food (types 1-3) or junk (other types), updates database counters. Manages messenger entity spawning with UDB file deletion on state change. Implements 5-slot mail queue at this+0x564 with auto-spawning of type_10 entities. Controls desktop wallpaper refresh every 120 frames (DAT_00468bbc counter) with screen saver state management. Enumerates windows and partitions screen grid for entity placement. Concludes with entity update pass via FUN_00424eb0. Early-exits if DAT_00469090 flag set.

0x0046906c.name: FUN_0043f590
0x0046906c.summary: Frame rate monitoring function called each frame. Increments global frame counter DAT_0046906c, queries current time via timeGetTime to DAT_00469070, calculates frame delta time accounting for previous time and offset (DAT_00469074). Every 1000+ milliseconds, formats FPS value to display buffer at DAT_0046907c using format string s__d_FPS_00461860.

0x00465098.name: FUN_00414cd0
0x00465098.summary: Updates distance calculation and movement state flags. Sets flags at this+0x18c (1.0f) and this+0x1a8 (0), calculates Euclidean distance from stored position (this+0xe0/e4/e8) to param_1 target position, stores distance at this+400 (offset 0x190). If param_1[0x10] duration and global _DAT_00465098 are valid, calculates normalized time factor (distance / (duration * global)) and stores at this+0x184, clamping minimum to 1.0f to prevent division issues.

0x00469070.name: FUN_00437660
0x00469070.summary: Main mouse click dispatcher with focus awareness and hit-testing. Checks if desktop or tooltip is active via check_if_desktop_or_tooltip_active (returns 1 when game has focus). Adjusts click coordinates (param_1, param_2) by subtracting window offsets at this+0x4ac and this+0x4b0. Hit-tests adjusted point via delegate_hit_test_to_entity to find entity under cursor. If no entity hit (null) or entity type is 0xe (special background/empty type): plays one-shot sound 3, calls handle_empty_space_click_by_value for default action. Otherwise: dispatches to entity's click handler via vtable call at offset +0x70 with local coordinates. Finally sets timestamp or state at this+0xac8 to DAT_00469070.

0x00469070.name: FUN_004376f0
0x00469070.summary: Comprehensive mouse button down event handler with focus awareness and capture management. First validates foreground window is desktop or tooltip via check_if_desktop_or_tooltip_active, early-returning if different window active. Transforms screen coordinates (param_1, param_2) to local space by subtracting viewport offsets at this+0x4ac/0x4b0. Performs hit-test on primary entity at this+0x51c via delegate_hit_test_to_entity. On hit: if entity type at hit_entity+0x4c != 0xe, sets mouse capture on window at this+0x4a8, marks capture active (this+0xc58=1), invokes entity's click handler (vtable+0x74); if type==0xe, delegates to secondary object at this+0x528 via dual_hit_test_or. On miss: tests secondary object if present. Cleanup: if capture flag set but no SetCapture called, releases capture and clears flag. Always updates state at this+0xac8 with global DAT_00469070 value.

0x00469070.name: FUN_00437820
0x00469070.summary: Mouse button release event handler with focus checking and capture management. Checks desktop/tooltip focus, returns early if not focused. Adjusts coordinates by window offsets this+0x4ac/0x4b0. Hit-tests via delegate_hit_test_to_entity: if entity found, calls its mouse-up vtable method at +0x78 with local coordinates. For no-hit or entity types 0xe (background) or 0x17 (special type), additionally calls try_two_vtable_methods_or_chain on object at this+0x528 (backup event target). If capture flag at this+0xc58==1, calls ReleaseCapture and clears flag. Finally sets timestamp/state at this+0xac8 to DAT_00469070. Paired with FUN_00437660 (mouse down handler using vtable +0x70).

0x00469070.name: FUN_004378f0
0x00469070.summary: Primary mouse click dispatcher that routes clicks to UI entities with coordinate transformation and entity type filtering. First checks if foreground window is desktop/tooltip (FUN_0043b2e0) to prevent clicks when game isn't focused. Translates screen coordinates (param_1, param_2) to local space relative to viewport origin (this+0x4ac/0x4b0), performs hit testing via delegate_hit_test_to_entity to find clicked entity, then invokes entity-specific click handler at vtable+0x80 with local coordinates. For special entity types 0xe (UI elements) and 0x17 (messages), or when no entity hit, delegates to fallback handler at this+0x528 via dispatch_to_dual_handlers. Finally updates global click timestamp at DAT_00469070 via set_dword_at_ac8.

0x00469070.name: FUN_004379a0
0x00469070.summary: Mouse click event handler specifically for Active Desktop interaction. First checks if foreground window is desktop or tooltip via check_if_desktop_or_tooltip_active (returns early if not). Calculates relative coordinates by subtracting window origin offsets (this+0x4ac, this+0x4b0) from screen coordinates param_1/param_2. Delegates hit-test to entity at this+0x51c via delegate_hit_test_to_entity. If entity found under cursor, invokes vtable method at offset 0x84 passing the relative coordinates (likely entity's onClick handler). Finally stores global DAT_00469070 value to this+0xac8 via set_dword_at_ac8, probably updating last-click timestamp or state flag.

0x00469070.name: FUN_00437b50
0x00469070.summary: Mouse movement/hover event handler for Active Desktop interaction. Checks if foreground is desktop/tooltip via check_if_desktop_or_tooltip_active, returns early if not. Unlike FUN_004379a0 which transforms coordinates, this passes raw param_1/param_2 directly to POINT structure (local_8.x/y). Delegates hit-test to entity via delegate_hit_test_to_entity(this, &local_8). If entity found, invokes vtable method at offset 0x8c (distinct from click handler's 0x84). Finally stores global DAT_00469070 to this+0xac8 via set_dword_at_ac8. Vtable 0x8c likely implements onHover/onMouseMove behavior like highlighting, tooltips, or cursor changes. The lack of coordinate transformation suggests param_1/param_2 are already in the correct space (window-relative or entity-relative).

0x00469070.name: FUN_00437ba0
0x00469070.summary: Specialized click handler for mail notification icon that conditionally displays incoming mail list. First checks if foreground window is desktop/tooltip (prevents handling clicks when game unfocused), then evaluates whether mail dialog should be shown by calling check_mail_dialog_condition on mail manager at this+0x520 (checks if mail exists and hasn't been read). If condition met, invokes show_mail_list_dialog to display mail list UI. Finally updates global click timestamp at DAT_00469070. The two-stage check (dialog condition + show) allows mail icon to be visible but non-interactive when no unread mail exists.
